judgment.summary: Cloudflare offers strong revenue growth and healthy gross margins but trades at a high valuation with negative net profitability.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS beat estimates by 7% (0.25 vs 0.23), with the next earnings date set for 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth of 33.5% shows strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin of 73.3% indicates high efficiency in service delivery.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $755.00M provides significant liquidity.
Total cash of $4.16B exceeds total debt of $3.52B.
negatives: Forward P/E of 129.54x suggests a very high valuation.
Profit margin of -3.7% indicates the company is not yet net profitable.
Debt/Equity ratio of 230.86 is relatively high.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 29.99x reflects a premium valuation.

news.paragraph: The provided headlines do not contain any news or specific information regarding Cloudflare (NET). Consequently, there are no imminent catalysts or recent developments available to inform an options trading strategy for this ticker.
